title: SEC DG Meets Auditor General In Abuja - FinancialEDGE
description: Photo Caption L-R Director Office of the Auditor General, Ogwe Uchechukwu; Executive commissioner Cooperate Services (SEC) Samiya Hassan Usman; Auditor General of the Federation, Shaakaa Kanyitor Chira; DG SEC, Dr Emomotimi Agama; Director Office of the Auditor General, Abbey Oweiziarerebo during a meeting between SEC and Auditor General in Abuja Monday.
html: Photo Caption  L-R Director Office of the Auditor General, Ogwe Uchechukwu; Executive commissioner Cooperate Services (SEC) Samiya Hassan Usman; Auditor General of the Federation, Shaakaa Kanyitor Chira; DG SEC, Dr Emomotimi Agama; Director Office of the Auditor General, Abbey Oweiziarerebo during a meeting between SEC and Auditor General in Abuja Monday.
